name: prettier-plugin-spark
description: Prettier plugin for spark-html single-file components — formats <script> (JS), <style> (CSS), and <spark-ssr> block bodies (aligned bindings, SQL broken at top-level clauses, string- and comment-aware) — and leaves the rest of your markup byte-for-byte untouched (so {interpolations} and onclick={handlers} are never corrupted).
author: Wilkin Novo
